text: A jailbroken agent runs code as root inside the sandbox.\nIronClaw assumes it already won.
Escape 1, phone home to exfiltrate.\nnetwork=none, only loopback exists. Denied.
Escape 2, read the operator host.\nThe host root is outside the sandbox namespace. Denied.
Escape 3, seize the Docker Engine socket.\nIt was never mounted in. Denied.
3 of 3 escapes denied. The box held.\nIsolation you can prove, not just promise.
Star IronClaw on GitHub.\nbrew install ironsecco/ironclaw/ironclaw
